name: No Man's Sky
description: No Man's Sky is a game about exploration and survival in an infinite procedurally generated universe.
requirements:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10/11 (64-bit versions)
  • Processor: Intel Core i3
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Nvidia GTX 1060 3GB, AMD RX 470 4GB, Intel UHD graphics 630
  • Storage: 15 GB available space
  • VR Support: SteamVR
comment1: I played... my son got old enough to sit with me and explore... then old enough to take the controller and go on his own adventures. Incredible game, we leave it on. Literally a lifetime worth of content. Get in the mix with a battle if youre feeling frisky, explore the deepest oceans, build the highest bases, or be lazy and look for lush systems with unique environments. I'm writing this on the 10th anniversary update as it downloads a ton of new (and always free!) content. Never wrote a review before, probably wont again.
comment2: Awesome graphics, awesome gameplay, fine optimisation, and a ton of content. It may seem as walking simulator, or  too much grind, but it's less than 5% of the game. The longer you play, the less you need to walk or grind for materials, so it doesn't get repetetive as some might say. Would reccomend if you like exploration and calm gameplay. However, the game offers survival and permadeath mode (or even custom difficulty), which allows for much more challenging gameplay than usually.
